title: Akka Ketha Mappulla Lyrics Vettai
stanzas:
Thaiya thakka thakka
nee engirukka makka
Soala kaattu chokka
Ada kaathirukka akka(2)

yakka yakka thavalakka
yerikara meenakka
eppedi venum maappillai
eduthu viduren kelakka

pattam poochi kettuppo
thotta sinungi kettuppo
akka kuruvi kettuppo
pakka lista kettuppo

Ayyanaarathan Pola
romba periya meesaiyum venam
ambi paiyana pola
ada kambi meesaiyum venam

romba padichavan venam
school bencha theichavan venam
pencil bodiyum venam
mike tyson polavum venam

kaadhu chootil vervai vaziya
cellil pesi kenjanum
Marriage aana piragum kooda
charger oda suthanum

office pona enna
marakka koodathu
Veetil offeeca pathi
avan pesa koodathu

thozhil naan saayum pothu
thozhan pol mara vendum
thai pola enai thangum
aan vendum

Kattam kattama thaane
oru satta pottavan venam
katta mannu naan potta
adha thaandi poravan venaam

Shopping panna naan pona
billa paathu Morappavan venam
thoondil maattina meena
avan thumbil sikkanum thaana

sinna vayasu photo paarthu
enna kandu pidikkanum
enakku vantha kaadhal kaditham
senthu padichu kilikkanum

sandegap paarvai
avan paarkka koodathu
naan sandegama paartha
avan mirazha koodathu

enna paaratta venam
seeraatta venam
oru paarva
athu podhum eppodhum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Akka Ketha Mappulla?

The music was composed by the renowned composer Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Which movie features the song Akka Ketha Mappulla?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Vettai.

Who are the singers of the song Akka Ketha Mappulla?

The song was sung by Harini and Saindhavi.

What is the release year of the movie Vettai?

The movie Vettai was released in the year 2012.

What is the theme of the song Akka Ketha Mappulla?

The song is a lively and energetic folk dance number celebrating joy and festivity.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Akka Ketha Mappulla from the Tamil movie Vettai (2012) is a lively and energetic folk number. Featuring the lead actors Arya and Amala Paul, the song showcases a festive and celebratory mood. Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja and sung by Harini and Saindhavi, it captivates listeners with its vibrant beats and engaging lyrics. This track is a perfect addition to any celebration or festive gathering, embodying joy and enthusiasm.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Akka Ketha Mappulla, from the movie Vettai, is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of Tamil folk music. Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja and sung by Harini and Saindhavi, this song is a celebration of joy and festivity. Its lively beats and catchy lyrics make it a favorite for dance enthusiasts and music lovers alike.
stanzaMeanings: Where are you, my dear? Show yourself, sister.
I will catch the fish that is swimming away, how should I catch the groom?
The butterfly is flying, the bird is chirping, the list is being checked.
Where are you, my dear? Don't be scared.
Like Ayyanar, I need a big mustache, and like Ambi, I need a thin mustache.
I need someone who has studied a lot, someone who has a school bag, a pencil, and someone as tough as Mike Tyson.
In the forest, I need to talk on the cell phone, even after marriage, I need to roam around with a charger.
I shouldn't forget what happens at the office, he shouldn't talk about the office at home.
When I finish work, I should be like a friend, and like a mother, I should be taken care of.
Where are you, my dear? Don't be scared.
I need someone who can take a risk, someone who can cross the barrier I set.
When I go shopping, I need to see the bill, I need someone who can catch the fish that is in the net.
Looking at old photos, I need to find someone who can make me feel love again.
He shouldn't look at me with doubt, I shouldn't have any doubts about him.
I need to be seen, I need to be respected, just one glance is enough, always.
Where are you, my dear? Don't be scared.
